title: canarium ovatum
intro: Canarium ovatum, also known as Pili or Kabayun, is a species of tree native to the Philippines and parts of Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Burseraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which are rich in nutrients and antioxidants, and have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Canarium ovatum include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Canarium ovatum is often prepared as herbal tea, capsules, or extracts, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
